limitations: Known sector operators remain represented, but the extra curvature remainder action is not derived.
No sector is assumed safe by fit or by analogy.

rows.limitation: Lepton-sector curvature remainder cannot be separated from the missing mixed contraction.
Up-sector curvature remainder may be affected by sector/coframe connection terms.
Down-sector curvature remainder may be affected by sector/coframe connection terms.

title: BHSM v2.8 Curvature Remainder Sector Action Report
